description: Reads, appends, and updates data in Google Sheets spreadsheets.

setupGuide.title: Finding your Google Sheet ID (2 Simple Steps)
setupGuide.summary: To connect Google Sheets, you just need the Spreadsheet ID from your web browser URL.
steps: Open your Google Sheet in your web browser.
Look at the URL bar at the top (e.g., https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BxiMVs0XRA5nFMdKbB.../edit). Copy the long string of characters between /d/ and /edit - that is your Spreadsheet ID!

requiredFields.label: Spreadsheet ID
requiredFields.description: The ID of the spreadsheet from the URL

requiredFields.label: Sheet Name
requiredFields.description: The name of the worksheet tab (e.g. Sheet1)
